input.title: Animation: Toggle Context View
input.body:
## Steps to Reproduce

```
- a
  - m
    - x
- b
  - m
    - y
```

Toggle Context View on `a/m`.

## Current Behavior

No animation:

https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/b548213e-051a-49f8-a2fb-06d2166e1a9d

## Expected Behavior

- [ ] Animate each child as [disappearing text](https://codepen.io/raine/pen/ZEgRMwR?editors=1100).
- [ ] Normal view fades out from lower left.
- [ ] Context view fades in from upper right.
- [ ] When closing the context view, the animation is reversed.
- [ ] Smoothly switch directions when context view is rapidly toggled.

Demonstration:

https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/8d75f68e-01e2-4590-a642-88e992294737
